summary: Iteration 45: Audit Trail UI, PDF Export, Admin Permission Editor - All 3 P0 features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: All UI components verified working.

issues: StatusBadge component crashed when person data was undefined - FIXED by adding null check

audit_trail_ui.GET /api/admin/audit-log: PASS - Returns entries array and total count
audit_trail_ui./audit-log page loads: PASS - data-testid=audit-log-page with table, filter pills, Export CSV button
audit_trail_ui.Filter pills work: PASS - Clicking 'Giving' shows only donation_processed entries

critical_code_review_comments: AuditLogPage.jsx correctly implements all required components with proper data-testid attributes
ReportsPage.jsx properly displays CSV and PDF export buttons for all report types
PermissionEditor.jsx shows checkbox grid with role templates, save and reset buttons
PersonDetail.jsx correctly includes Permissions tab with PermissionEditor component
Backend /api/admin/audit-log endpoint returns entries with filtering support
Backend /api/admin/reports/export endpoint supports both CSV and PDF formats
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/PersonDetail.jsx (fixed StatusBadge null check, fixed userId prop)
seed_data_creation: Created test donations via /api/giving/process during backend testing (visible in audit log)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified 3 P0 features: (1) Audit Trail UI at /audit-log with filterable table, CSV export, expandable rows showing before/after; (2) PDF Export via POST /api/admin/reports/export with format=csv|pdf; (3) Admin Permission Editor as Permissions tab in PersonDetail showing checkbox grid with role template dropdown. Note: Use valid person IDs from /api/people endpoint - Aivy's user_id f1d0f1d8-de66-4fc0-a8c7-8f81f679ce22 is a user_id not a person_id. DemoWalkthrough modal appears on first visit - dismiss with 'I'll figure it out myself' button. Rate limiting: 5 logins/min per IP.

mocked_apis_list: All 6 payment processors (Stripe, Pushpay, Tithe.ly, Planning Center, Subsplash, Manual) - return realistic fake responses
Twilio SMS notifications - logged to console

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: GET /api/admin/roles/templates returned templates directly instead of wrapped in 'templates' key
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Wrapped response in {'templates': ...} to match frontend expectation

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: PermissionEditor received 'id' (undefined) instead of 'personId' from useParams
StatusBadge crashed when status was undefined
